creator: asiciliano@FreeBSD.org
text:
I am adding libxo support to a 'sysctl(8)' clone, libxo=xml fails with a huge string (example "sysctl debug.witness.fullgraph"). The problem is reproducible and described by the file:

https://gitlab.com/alfix/nsysctl/blob/master/problem-xo-huge-string.c

(uname -a FreeBSD fbsd 13.0-CURRENT FreeBSD 13.0-CURRENT r345315 GENERIC  amd64)

Regards,
Alfonso
